creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
On 10/30/13 11:47, Dmitry Marakasov wrote:
> * Jason Bacon (jwbacon@tds.net) wrote:
>
>>> Number:         183450
>>> Category:       ports
>>> Synopsis:       Change request: science/InsightToolkit
>>> Confidential:   no
>>> Severity:       non-critical
>>> Priority:       low
>>> Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>>> State:          open
>>> Quarter:
>>> Keywords:
>>> Date-Required:
>>> Class:          change-request
>>> Submitter-Id:   current-users
>>> Arrival-Date:   Tue Oct 29 18:10:03 UTC 2013
>>> Closed-Date:
>>> Last-Modified:
>>> Originator:     Jason Bacon
>>> Release:        9.1-RELEASE
>>> Organization:
>> Acadix Consulting, LLC
>>> Environment:
>> FreeBSD sculpin.jbacon.dyndns.org 8.3-RELEASE FreeBSD 8.3-RELEASE #0: Mon Apr  9 21:23:18 UTC 2012     root@mason.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
>>> Description:
>> I suggest retiring science/InsightToolkit.  The port is badly outdated and used by only one other port (graphics/osg) as a non-default option.
>>
>> I no longer work in medical imaging and don't have time to maintain it.
> I suggest we just reset maintainership - there's no need to retire it.
>

Note that it's currently broken on 10.0.
